---
name: G Prioritization
description: Shipped beats perfect. G will explicitly ask for polish; don't volunteer it on first pass.
type: user
---

G's explicit preference: get the first working version shipped, then iterate. Do not volunteer polish, refactoring, or "while we're at it" improvements unless G asks.

**How to apply:** On first pass, implement exactly what was asked. Minimum viable. Note any follow-ups you noticed in the summary, but do not implement them. Wait for explicit direction.
